user_request: Evaluate different binarization methods on root images and choose the best mask generation method.

candidate_tools.reason: The request requires comparing image binarization methods against ground truth masks.
Projection generation may be a downstream step, but the current request focuses on mask evaluation.
Root weight prediction depends on later pipeline stages and is not the immediate task.

selected_tool.reason: Highest match score and directly supports evaluating masks using IoU, Dice, precision, recall, and F1.

selected_agents.role: Validate input images and ground truth masks before evaluation.
Interpret segmentation quality and recommend the best binarization method.

knowledge_sources.used_for: Confirm expected image and mask formats.

human_review.reason: The task only evaluates image masks and does not trigger external actions or irreversible changes.

fallback_plan.condition: No ground truth masks are available.
fallback_plan.fallback: Route to unsupervised_mask_quality_assessment instead of supervised evaluation.
